data.name: AccessibilityAdapter Agent
data.description: Adapts educational content for accessibility by generating alternative text, captioning media, restructuring documents for screen readers, and ensuring WCAG compliance for inclusive learning experiences.
data.readme:
## AccessibilityAdapter Agent

Adapts educational content for accessibility by generating alternative text, captioning media, restructuring documents for screen readers, and ensuring WCAG compliance for inclusive learning experiences.

### Framework: LlamaIndex

### Tools
["Alt Text Generator","Captioning Engine","WCAG Validator"]

### Tags
["accessibility","wcag","inclusive","adaptation"]
data.author: EducationAI Labs
